name: Bug Report
about: Something isn't working the way you expected
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug
A clear, concise description of what the bug is.

## To Reproduce
Minimal code snippet that reproduces the issue:
```typescript
// paste your code here
```

## Expected behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior
What actually happened. Include the full error message or trace output.

## Environment
- AgentTrace version: (run `npm list @hackerx333/agenttrace`)
- Node.js version: (run `node --version`)
- OS: (e.g. macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04)
- Framework: (e.g. LangChain, CrewAI, plain Node.js)

## Additional context
Any other context, logs, or screenshots.
